# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters:
  - name: 'storageAccountName'
    type: string   # (required, the resource id of your defaultStorage account in Azure)    
resources:
  - name: StorageAcccountTemplateLinux_DEV
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts//providers/microsoft.arm/deployments?api-version=2019-10-01&location=westeurope'   # ARM template reference URI (required)
properties:  // properties of the deployment to be provided in a YAML file or as inline input through http PUT requests. These should match exactly with existing deployments for changes and deletions will not trigger re-deployment which is why there are no updates defined here, but you can update parameters/variables if needed via this template
    deployment: true   // Define whether the resource group or single ARM resources needs to be deployed by setting it as "true" otherwise set its value in false. Defaults for new created Azure Resource groups is 'false'  (required)
